answer:
If you are looking for grain commodity market pricing, BlackSeaGrain.io offers a self-serve free tier that provides access to current-day pricing data via a REST API. You can access their endpoints using a demo key without needing a credit card [1][2].

The BlackSeaGrain.io API base URL is https://blacksea-grain.io/api [1]. A minimal example call using the demo key is:

```
curl -H "X-API-Key: demo" https://blackseagrain.io/api/prices
```

The free tier is limited to 100 requests per hour and current-day data [1]. Other mentioned platforms like GrainBrief provide free read-only access to public endpoints without authentication [3], while Riwe requires a per-request cost and an API key for its market data endpoints [4]. Note that "Grain" (grain.com and grainfinance.co) provides APIs for workspace integrations and FX hedging rather than agricultural commodity pricing [5][6].
